Id: IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccines
Url: IMMZ.D2.DT.Cholera.WC vaccines
Version: 0.2.0
Title: IMMZ.D2.DT.Cholera.WC vaccines
Status: draft
Type:

system: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/plan-definition-type

code: eca-rule

Date: 2026-03-25 23:30:34+0000
Publisher: WHO
Description:

IMMZ.D2.DT.Cholera.WC vaccines Whole-cell (WC) vaccines schedule
Knowledge Capability: computable
Related Artifacts:

References

  • WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)
Libraries:
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Actions:

If: Applicability: Client is due for cholera vaccination (Client is due for cholera vaccination)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('draft')
intent: ('proposal')
medication: (Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE2', display: 'Cholera vaccines' } }, display: 'Cholera vaccines' })
Determine if the client is due for Cholera.: Determine if the client is due for Cholera vaccine according to the national immunization protocol. Whole-cell (WC) vaccines schedule

Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR

Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR

payload.contentString: (Guidance)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })

extension.valueString: IMMZEncounterElements
Current Patient Age In Years

/** 
 * @dataElement Patient age in years
 */
define "Current Patient Age In Years":
  AgeInYearsAt(Today)
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Client's age is less than 1 year
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Client is not due for cholera vaccination Case 1
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Client's age is more than or equal to 1 year
IMMZElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  [Immunization] I
    where I.status = 'completed'
    and I.isSubpotent is not true
IMMZEncounterElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I
    where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Cholera Doses Administered to Patient

/*
@internal: Cholera containing Doses Administered to Patient
*/
define "Cholera Doses Administered to Patient":
  Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I
  where
    I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Cholera vaccines"
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Cholera Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Number of Cholera Primary Series Doses Administered
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
One cholera primary series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Date of Latest Cholera Dose
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
The latest cholera dose was administered less than 14 days ago
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Client is not due for cholera vaccination Case 2
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Client is not due for cholera vaccination
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Client is not due for cholera vaccination Guidance

/*
@output: Client is not due for cholera vaccination Guidance
@guidance = Should not vaccinate client with cholera dose as client's age is under 1 year.
Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first cholera dose.
@guidance = Should not vaccinate client with cholera dose as the latest cholera dose was administered less than 14 days ago.
Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the next dose.
*/
define "Client is not due for cholera vaccination Guidance":
  case
    when "Client is not due for cholera vaccination Case 1" then 'Should not vaccinate client with cholera dose as client\'s age is under 1 year.
Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first cholera dose.'
    when "Client is not due for cholera vaccination Case 2" then 'Should not vaccinate client with cholera dose as the latest cholera dose was administered less than 14 days ago.
Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the next dose.'
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
No cholera primary series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 1
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
The latest cholera dose was administered more than 14 days ago
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 2
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Two cholera primary series doses were administered
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Cholera Booster Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Number of Cholera Booster Series Doses Administered
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
At least one booster series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
The latest cholera dose was administered less than 3 years ago
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
The latest cholera dose was administered more than 3 years ago
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 3
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Client is due for cholera vaccination
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Client is due for cholera vaccination Guidance

/*
@output: Client is due for cholera vaccination Guidance
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as no doses have been given.
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as the latest cholera dose was administered more than 14 days ago.
Check for contraindications.
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as the booster series for cholera was completed more than 3 years ago. 
Check for contraindications.
*/
define "Client is due for cholera vaccination Guidance":
  case
    when "Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 1" then 'Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as no doses have been given.'
    when "Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 2" then 'Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as the latest cholera dose was administered more than 14 days ago.
Check for contraindications.'
    when "Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 3" then 'Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as the booster series for cholera was completed more than 3 years ago. 
Check for contraindications.'
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
No cholera booster series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Primary series is complete. Client is not due for cholera booster dose
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Primary series is complete. Client is not due for cholera booster dose Guidance
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose Guidance
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Dose number of the latest dose is one
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Client is not due for cholera booster dose
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Client is not due for cholera booster dose Guidance
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
The latest cholera dose was administered more than 14 days ago and less than 3 years ago
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Client is due for cholera booster dose
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Client is due for cholera booster dose Guidance
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Dose number of the latest dose is two
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Booster series is complete
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Booster series is complete Guidance
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Guidance

/*
@dynamicValue: Guidance
*/
define "Guidance":
  case 
    when "Client is not due for cholera vaccination" then "Client is not due for cholera vaccination Guidance"
    when "Client is due for cholera vaccination" then "Client is due for cholera vaccination Guidance"
    when "Primary series is complete. Client is not due for cholera booster dose" then "Primary series is complete. Client is not due for cholera booster dose Guidance"
    when "Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose" then "Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose Guidance"
    when "Client is not due for cholera booster dose" then "Client is not due for cholera booster dose Guidance"
    when "Client is due for cholera booster dose" then "Client is due for cholera booster dose Guidance"
    when "Booster series is complete" then "Booster series is complete Guidance" 
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCVaccinesLogic
Has Guidance

define "Has Guidance":
  "Guidance" is not null and "Guidance" != ''
IMMZCommon
seriesPrimary

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series
 */
define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value string): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToBoolean
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToConcept

define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept):
    if concept is null then
        null
    else
        System.Concept {
            codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C),
            display: concept.text.value
        }
FHIRHelpers
ToCode

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding):
    if coding is null then
        null
    else
        System.Code {
          code: coding.code.value,
          system: coding.system.value,
          version: coding.version.value,
          display: coding.display.value
        }
WHOCommon
mostRecent

define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  Last(
    immunizations I
      sort by start of occurrence.toInterval()
  )
IMMZCommon
seriesBooster

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the Booster series
 */
define fluent function seriesBooster(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Booster dose' )
IMMZCommon
getDose

/**
 * @description: Gets a given immunization from a list that matches the dose number
 */
define fluent function getDose(immunization Immunization, doseNumber String):
  immunization I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.doseNumber = doseNumber )

parameter.name: Client is due for cholera booster dose
Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose
Client is due for cholera vaccination

relatedArtifact.citation: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

extension.valueMarkdown: For WC vaccines (Shanchol, Euvchol and mORCVAX), 2 doses should be given 14 days apart to individuals aged ≥ 1 year.
